notes: Clean orbit around world +Y. look_at is the convergence point of anchor A and B's forward rays (~(-1.42, 0.22, -0.28)) -- not scene origin -- which matches where the user was actually pointing the camera. Camera orbits at y=0.012 (mean of anchor camera Y), radius 2.97 in X-Z plane. Axis snapped from noisy measured axis [-0.014, 0.9998, 0.010] to clean +Y. world_up = -Y because scene loaded with --flip-scene.
